zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabelle de Mauvoisin於1190年之前出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯豐特納-莫瓦辛時，她的父親Robert III de Mauvoisin18歲，母親Cécile de Chevreuse10歲。她於1211年9月18日與Adam de Beaumont du Gâtinais II結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1249年。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabelle de Mauvoisin于1190年之前出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯豐特納-莫瓦辛时，她的父亲Robert III de Mauvoisin18岁，母亲Cécile de Chevreuse10岁。她于1211年9月18日与Adam de Beaumont du Gâtinais II结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1249年。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Isabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabelle de Mauvoisin was born before 1190, in Fontenay-Mauvoisin, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, her father, Robert III de Mauvoisin, was 18 and her mother, Cécile de Chevreuse, was 10. She married Adam de Beaumont du Gâtinais II on 18 September 1211. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1249.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabelle de Mauvoisin est née avant 1190, à Fontenay-Mauvoisin, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, son père, Robert III de Mauvoisin, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Cécile de Chevreuse, avait 10 ans. Elle a épousé Adam de Beaumont du Gâtinais II le 18 septembre 1211. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1249.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabelle de Mauvoisin vor 1190 in Fontenay-Mauvoisin, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert III de Mauvoisin 18 und ihre Mutter Cécile de Chevreuse 10. Sie hat am 18. September 1211 Adam de Beaumont du Gâtinais II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1249.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle de Mauvoisin è nata il prima del 1190 nel Fontenay-Mauvoisin, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Robert III de Mauvoisin, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Cécile de Chevreuse, aveva 10 anni. Lei sposato Adam de Beaumont du Gâtinais II il 18 settembre 1211. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1249.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Mauvoisinが1190年以前にフランスiレ-デ-フランスイベラインスフォンテナイ-マウボイシンで生まれた時，父Robert III de Mauvoisinは18歳，母Cécile de Chevreuseは10歳であった。1211年9月18日にAdam de Beaumont du Gâtinais IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1249年に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Mauvoisin(이)가 1190년 이전 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 이벨라이네스 폰텐아이-모보이쟁에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert III de Mauvoisin(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cécile de Chevreuse(은)는 10세였다. 그녀는 1211년 9월 18일 Adam de Beaumont du Gâtinais II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1249년 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle de Mauvoisin nasceu antes 1190, em Fontenay-Mauvoisin, Yvelines, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Robert III de Mauvoisin, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Cécile de Chevreuse, tinha 10 anos. Ela casou-se com Adam de Beaumont du Gâtinais II em 18 de setembro de 1211. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1249.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabelle de Mauvoisin родилась перед 1190 г. в местности фонтенеи-маувоисин, ивелаинесь, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert III de Mauvoisin было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Cécile de Chevreuse, 10. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Adam de Beaumont du Gâtinais II 18 сентября 1211 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1249 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabelle de Mauvoisin nació antes de 1190, en Fontenay-Mauvoisin, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Robert III de Mauvoisin, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Cécile de Chevreuse, tenía 10 años. Se casó con Adam de Beaumont du Gâtinais II el 18 de septiembre de 1211. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1249.
